title: salvia viridis var. horminum
intro: Salvia viridis var. horminum, also known as blue sage or green sage, is a subspecies of the salvia viridis plant, which belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Salvia viridis var. horminum include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain and muscle spasms, and supporting respiratory health. The herbal preparations of this plant can be used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture, and it can also be used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
